description_long: This is a large, heavily modified tanker truck with a rugged, post-apocalyptic appearance. The cab is armored and weathered, featuring reinforced panels and a matte, dusty finish. The tanker trailer is cylindrical, with multiple axles and wheels for heavy-duty support, and is adorned with makeshift metal reinforcements, barbed wire, and mounted weaponry or antennae on top. The truck's exterior is primarily a mix of worn yellow and brown tones, with visible rust and grime, suggesting extensive use in harsh environments. The front of the cab is robust, with a prominent grille and headlight assembly, while the rear of the tanker is equipped with additional protective structures. The overall design suggests a vehicle built for survival and transport in dangerous, urban or wasteland scenarios.
description: A large, armored, and weathered tanker truck with reinforced panels, multiple axles, and mounted equipment, finished in dusty yellow and brown tones. The vehicle has a rugged, post-apocalyptic look with visible wear and protective modifications.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck and tanker, highlighting the armored cab, cylindrical tanker, and mounted equipment on top.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the end of the tanker, showing the protective structures, multiple wheels, and the narrow profile of the vehicle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, but with different lighting and visibility of the tanker’s surface details and mounted equipment.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the armored cab, grille, and headlight assembly, as well as the top-mounted equipment and the start of the tanker section.
